inputs.name: headerText
inputs.description: Defines the header text of the menu (displayed on mobile).

inputs.name: horizontalAlign
inputs.description: Determines the horizontal alignment of the menu relative to its opener control.

inputs.name: loading
inputs.description: Defines if a loading indicator would be displayed inside the corresponding ui5-menu popover.

inputs.name: loadingDelay
inputs.description: Defines the delay in milliseconds, after which the loading indicator will be displayed inside the corresponding ui5-menu popover.

inputs.name: open
inputs.description: Indicates if the menu is open.

inputs.name: opener
inputs.description:
Defines the ID or DOM Reference of the element at which the menu is shown.
When using this attribute in a declarative way, you must only use the `id` (as a string) of the element at which you want to show the popover.
You can only set the `opener` attribute to a DOM Reference when using JavaScript.

inputs.name: placement
inputs.description: Determines on which side the component is placed at.

outputs.name: ui5BeforeClose
outputs.description: Fired before the menu is closed. This event can be cancelled, which will prevent the menu from closing.

outputs.name: ui5BeforeOpen
outputs.description:
Fired before the menu is opened. This event can be cancelled, which will prevent the menu from opening.

*Note:** Since 1.14.0 the event is also fired before a sub-menu opens.

outputs.name: ui5Close
outputs.description: Fired after the menu is closed.

outputs.name: ui5ItemClick
outputs.description:
Fired when an item is being clicked.

*Note:** Since 1.17.0 the event is preventable, allowing the menu to remain open after an item is pressed.

outputs.name: ui5Open
outputs.description: Fired after the menu is opened.
